mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pi_datatypes_user ( DATATYPE_ID, DATATYPE_LABEL, CREATE_USER, DATATYPE, OCR, RECENT, CAPTURE, AP_NO, STD_ID, EXTENSION ) VALUES ( #{datatype_id}, #{datatype_label}, #{create_user}, #{datatype}, #{ocr}, #{recent}, #{capture}, #{ap_no}, #{std_id}, #{extension} )
INSERT INTO pi_datatypes ( DATATYPE_ID, STD_ID, DATATYPE, OCR, RECENT, EXTENSION ) VALUES ( #{datatype_id}, #{std_id}, #{datatype}, #{ocr}, #{recent}, #{extension} )
INSERT INTO pi_datatypes ( DATATYPE_ID, STD_ID, DATATYPE, OCR, RECENT, EXTENSION ) VALUES ( #{datatype_id}, #{std_id}, #{datatype}, #{ocr}, #{recent}, #{extension} )
mapper.select:
SELECT DATATYPE_ID, STD_ID, DATATYPE_LABEL, CREATE_USER, DATATYPE, OCR, RECENT, CAPTURE, EXTENSION FROM PI_AP_SERVER AP, PI_DATATYPES_USER DU WHERE 1=1 AND DU.ENABLE = 1 AND AP.AP_NO = DU.AP_NO AND AP.AP_NO = 0
AND DU.STD_ID = #{datatype_id}
AND DU.DATATYPE_LABEL like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY DU.DATATYPE_LABEL
mapper.update: UPDATE pi_datatypes_user SET DATATYPE_ID = #{datatype_id}, DATATYPE_LABEL = #{datatype_label}, DATATYPE = #{datatype}, OCR=#{ocr}, RECENT=#{recent}, CAPTURE=#{capture}, EXTENSION=#{extension} WHERE 1 = 1 AND STD_ID = #{std_id} AND AP_NO = #{ap_no} AND ENABLE = 1
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(STD_ID) FROM PI_DATATYPES_USER WHERE STD_ID = #{value}
mapper.update: UPDATE PI_DATATYPES_USER SET DATATYPE = #{new_std_id} WHERE STD_ID = #{std_id} AND ENABLE = 1
mapper.select: SELECT datatype_id, datatype_label, create_user, regdate, ocr, capture, enable FROM PI_DATATYPES_USER WHERE DATATYPE_ID = #{DATATYPE_ID} GROUP BY DATATYPE_ID

SELECT SP.IDX AS IDX ,SP.POLICY_NAME AS NAME ,SP.COMMENT AS COMMENT ,DU.datatype_label AS TYPE ,DU.datatype_label AS TYPE1 ,DU.DATATYPE_ID AS DATATYPE_ID ,DU.STD_ID AS STD_ID ,SP.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_DAYS AS PAUSE_DAYS ,SP.ENABLED AS ENABLED ,SP.VIEW_USER AS VIEW_USER ,SP.CYCLE AS CYCLE ,IFNULL(SP.ACTION, 0) AS ACTION ,DATE_FORMAT(SP.START_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS START_DTM ,SCHEDULE_PAUSE_FROM AS PAUSE_FROM ,SCHEDULE_PAUSE_FROM_MINU AS PAUSE_FROM_MINU ,SCHEDULE_PAUSE_TO AS PAUSE_TO ,SCHEDULE_PAUSE_TO_MINU AS PAUSE_TO_MINU ,DU.DATATYPE AS DATATYPE ,policy_type AS POLICY_TYPE ,DU.recent AS RECENT, SP.RECON_CPU, SP.RECON_MEMORY, SP.THROUGHPUT_RATE, SP.RECON_TRACE ,IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_scan_policy_server where policy_id =SP.IDX GROUP BY IDX),0) AS SERVER_CNT
,IFNULL((SELECT CONCAT('["', GROUP_CONCAT(IN_IDX SEPARATOR '","'), '"]') FROM pi_scan_policy_server where policy_id =SP.IDX GROUP BY IDX),'[]') AS SERVER
FROM PI_SCAN_POLICY SP LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_DATATYPES_USER DU ON SP.STD_ID = DU.STD_ID
AND DU.ENABLE = 1
WHERE 1=1
AND DU.ENABLE = 1
AND POLICY_TYPE = 1 AND SP.ENABLED = 1
AND POLICY_NAME like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
AND IDX = #{policyid}
AND DU.datatype_label like concat('%', #{policy_name}, '%')
AND SP.ENABLE = 1 GROUP BY IDX ORDER BY SP.IDX DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO PI_SCAN_POLICY (POLICY_NAME, COMMENT, CYCLE, ACTION, DATATYPE_ID, STD_ID, ENABLED, START_DTM, SCHEDULE_PAUSE_DAYS, SCHEDULE_PAUSE_FROM, SCHEDULE_PAUSE_FROM_MINU, SCHEDULE_PAUSE_TO, SCHEDULE_PAUSE_TO_MINU, VIEW_USER, POLICY_TYPE, RECON_CPU, RECON_MEMORY, THROUGHPUT_RATE, RECON_TRACE) VALUES (#{policy_name}, #{comment}, #{cycle}, #{action}, #{datatype_id}, #{std_id}, #{enabled}, STR_TO_DATE(#{start_dtm},'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'), #{pause_days}, #{from_time_hour}, #{from_time_minutes}, #{to_time_hour}, #{to_time_minutes}, #{user_no}, #{policy_type}, #{cpu}, #{memory}, #{throughput}, #{scanTrace})
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS policy_id
mapper.select:
SELECT DATA.TARGET_ID, DATA.AP_NO, DATA.FULL_NAME, DATA.HOST_NAME, DATA.NAME, DATA.SERIAL, DATA.PLATFORM, DATA.TARGET_USE, DATA.PATH_CNT, DATA.TOTAL, DATA.REGDATE, DATA.SCHEDULE_ID, DATA.LOCATION_ID, DATA.DATATYPE_ID, DATA.SCHEDULE_STATUS, DATA.SCHEDULE_STATUS AS SCHEDULE_STATUS2, DATA.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_DAYS, DATA.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_FROM, DATA.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_TO, DATA.SCHEDULE_REPEAT_DAYS, DATA.SCHEDULE_REPEAT_MONTHS, DATA.SCAN_TIME, IF(DATA.SCHEDULE_STATUS IN ('completed', 'stopped', 'interrupted'), DATA.SCAN_COMPLETE_TIME, NULL) AS SCAN_COMPLETE_TIME, DATA.GROUP_NAME,
DATA.${mngrList.MGNR_FLAG}, DATA.${mngrList.MGNR_FLAG}_nm,
DATA.CONFIRM, DATA.POLICY_ID, DATA.ENABLE, DATA.POLICY_NM, DATA.MEMO, DATA.RECON_AP FROM ( SELECT T.TARGET_ID, T.AP_NO, T.NAME AS FULL_NAME, SUBSTRING_INDEX(T.NAME, '.', 1) AS HOST_NAME, SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(T.NAME, '.', -2), '.', 1) AS NAME, SUBSTRING_INDEX(T.NAME, '.', -1) AS SERIAL, T.TARGET_USE, MAX_TP.PATH_CNT, MAX_TP.TOTAL, MAX_TP.REGDATE, SD.SCHEDULE_ID, SDL.LOCATION_ID, SD.SCHEDULE_DATATYPE_PROFILES AS DATATYPE_ID, SD.SCHEDULE_STATUS, SD.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_DAYS, SD.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_FROM, SD.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_TO, SD.SCHEDULE_REPEAT_DAYS, SD.SCHEDULE_REPEAT_MONTHS, FROM_UNIXTIME(SD.SCHEDULE_NEXT_SCAN,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS SCAN_TIME, FROM_UNIXTIME(SDL.UPDATED,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS SCAN_COMPLETE_TIME, CONCAT('recon0',SUM(T.AP_NO + 1),'(', AP.IP, ')') AS RECON_AP, TU.GROUP_NM AS GROUP_NAME, (SELECT NAME FROM pi_target_group WHERE IDX = TG.UP_IDX) AS PLATFORM, IFNULL(TU.SERVICE_NM, '-') AS SERVICE_NM,
MAX(CASE WHEN TU.userFlag = #{mngrList.MGNR_FLAG} THEN TU.user_no ELSE '' END) AS ${mngrList.MGNR_FLAG}, (SELECT USER_NAME FROM PI_USER WHERE USER_NO = MAX(CASE WHEN TU.userFlag = #{mngrList.MGNR_FLAG} THEN TU.user_no ELSE '' END)) AS ${mngrList.MGNR_FLAG}_nm,
MAX_STS.CONFIRM, MAX_STS.POLICY_ID, IFNULL(SP.ENABLE, 2) AS ENABLE, IFNULL(SP.POLICY_NAME,'') AS POLICY_NM, '' AS MEMO FROM PI_AP_SERVER AP, PI_TARGETS T LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_AGENTS A ON T.NAME = A.AGENT_NAME AND T.AP_NO = A.AP_NO AND AGENT_USE = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_TARGET_GROUP TG ON T.TARGET_ID = TG.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = TG.AP_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_TARGET_USER TU ON T.TARGET_ID = TU.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = TU.AP_NO
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT TP.TARGET_ID, TP.AP_NO, TP.PATH_CNT, TP.TOTAL, TP.REGDATE FROM pi_topcomp TP, (SELECT TCP.TARGET_ID, TCP.AP_NO ,MAX(TCP.REGDATE) AS REGDATE FROM pi_topcomp TCP GROUP BY TCP.TARGET_ID, TCP.AP_NO) TCP WHERE TCP.TARGET_ID = TP.TARGET_ID AND TCP.AP_NO = TP.AP_NO AND TP.REGDATE = TCP.REGDATE ) AS MAX_TP ON T.TARGET_ID = MAX_TP.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = MAX_TP.AP_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ST.TARGET_ID, ST.AP_NO, ST.LOCATION_ID, ST.RECON_SCHEDULE_ID,ST.REGDATE, ST.POLICY_ID, ST.CONFIRM FROM pi_schedule_targets ST, (SELECT STS.TARGET_ID, STS.AP_NO ,MAX(STS.REGDATE) AS REGDATE FROM pi_schedule_targets STS GROUP BY STS.TARGET_ID, STS.AP_NO) STS WHERE STS.TARGET_ID = ST.TARGET_ID AND STS.AP_NO = ST.AP_NO AND STS.REGDATE = ST.REGDATE ) AS MAX_STS ON T.TARGET_ID = MAX_STS.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = MAX_STS.AP_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_scan_policy SP ON MAX_STS.POLICY_ID = SP.IDX LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_schedules SD ON MAX_STS.AP_NO = SD.AP_NO AND MAX_STS.RECON_SCHEDULE_ID = SD.SCHEDULE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_scheduled_location SDL ON MAX_STS.AP_NO = SDL.AP_NO AND SDL.SCH_ID = SD.SCHEDULE_ID AND SD.SCHEDULE_TARGET_ID = SDL.TARGET_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND T.AP_NO = AP.AP_NO AND AP.IS_SERVER = 1 AND T.TARGET_USE = 'Y'
AND TU.USER_NO = #{user_no}
AND T.NAME LIKE concat('%', #{sch_host}, '%')
AND TU.SERVICE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{sch_svcName}, '%')
GROUP BY T.TARGET_ID, T.AP_NO ) DATA WHERE 1= 1
AND (DATA.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%','${sch_svcManager}','%') OR DATA.SERVICE_USER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%','${sch_svcManager}','%') OR DATA.ADMIN_NM LIKE CONCAT('%','${sch_svcManager}','%'))
AND (SELECT UA.USER_NAME FROM PI_USER UA WHERE ${mngrSizeList.server} = UA.USER_NO) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{mngrSizeList.server_user},'%')
AND DATA.GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{sch_group}, '%')
AND DATA.POLICY_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{sch_policy}, '%')
ORDER BY
FIELD(DATA.SCHEDULE_STATUS, 'failed', 'stalled', 'deactivated', 'queued', 'interrupted', 'completed', 'cancelled', 'stop', 'paused', 'scanning', 'scheduled') DESC, DATA.NAME DESC, DATA.SCHEDULE_STATUS DESC

SELECT DISTINCT U.USER_GRADE AS CHKBOX, '' as USER_PHONE_STATUS, U.USER_EMAIL, U.USER_NO, U.USER_ID, U.JIKWEE, U.JIKGUK, U.BOSS_NAME, U.USER_NAME, U.INSA_CODE, (SELECT G.TEAM_NAME FROM PI_GROUP G WHERE G.INSA_CODE = U.INSA_CODE) AS TEAM_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(U.REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %h:%i:%s' ) AS REGDATE, DATE_FORMAT(U.STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d' ) AS STARTDATE, DATE_FORMAT(U.ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d' ) AS ENDDATE, U.USER_GRADE, U.USER_GRADE AS OLD_USER_GRADE, IFNULL(U.USER_PHONE, '') AS USER_PHONE, if(NOW() > LOCK_DATE, 'N', 'Y') AS LOCK_ACCOUNT, U.ACCESS_IP, U.LOCK_STATUS, DATE_FORMAT(U.LOGINDATE, '%Y-%m-%d' ) AS LOGINDATE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(U.LOGINDATE, INTERVAL 3 MONTH), '%Y-%m-%d') AS LOGINDATE2, U.UNLOCK_REASON, U.LOCK_STATUS, '' AS MEMBER_STATUS, U.ACC_YN, (CASE WHEN U.ACC_YN = 'B' OR U.ACC_YN = 'Y' THEN '재직자' WHEN U.ACC_YN = 'V' THEN '휴직자' ELSE '퇴직자' END) AS ACC_YN_NM, LOCK_EMAIL FROM PI_USER U WHERE 1 = 1 #AND U.USER_GRADE != '9' AND U.ACC_YN NOT IN ('R', 'N')
AND U.USER_GRADE = #{sch_aut}
AND U.USER_ID LIKE concat('%', #{sch_id}, '%')
AND U.USER_NAME LIKE concat('%', #{sch_userName}, '%')
AND (SELECT G.TEAM_NAME FROM PI_GROUP G WHERE G.INSA_CODE = U.INSA_CODE) LIKE concat('%', #{sch_teamName}, '%')
AND U.ACC_YN IN ('B', 'Y')
AND U.ACC_YN = 'V'
AND DATE_FORMAT(U.LOGINDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d') AND U.LOCK_STATUS = ${sch_lockStatus}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pi_schedules ( schedule_id, schedule_status, schedule_label, schedule_repeat_days, schedule_repeat_months, schedule_datatype_profiles, schedule_next_scan, schedule_target_id, schedule_target_name, schedule_cpu, schedule_capture, schedule_trace, ap_no,
schedule_pause_days,
schedule_pause_from,
schedule_pause_to,
drm_status, regdate ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{status}, #{label}, #{repeat_days}, #{repeat_months}, #{profiles}, #{next_scan}, #{target_id}, #{target_name}, #{cpu}, #{capture}, #{trace}, #{ap_no},
#{pause_days},
#{pause_from},
#{pause_to},
#{drm}, now() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE schedule_label=#{label}, schedule_status=#{status}, schedule_repeat_days=#{repeat_days}, schedule_repeat_months=#{repeat_months}, schedule_datatype_profiles=#{profiles}, schedule_cpu=#{cpu}, schedule_capture=#{capture}, schedule_target_id=#{target_id}, schedule_target_name=#{target_name}, schedule_trace=#{trace}, schedule_next_scan=#{next_scan},
schedule_pause_days=#{pause_days},
schedule_pause_from=#{pause_from},
schedule_pause_to=#{pause_to},
drm_status=#{drm},
regdate=now()
mapper.select:
SELECT D.* FROM (SELECT CONCAT(CAST(COUNT(ST.TARGET_ID) AS CHAR), ' 대') AS SCAN_CNT, G.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID, G.SCHEDULE_GROUP_NAME, G.USER_NO, (SELECT U.USER_NAME FROM PI_USER U WHERE U.USER_NO = G.USER_NO) AS USER_NAME, G.STATUS, G.TYPE, G.POLICY_ID, IF(G.POLICY_ID = -1, '-', SP.POLICY_NAME) AS POLICY_NAME, G.DATATYPE_ID, DU.DATATYPE_LABEL, DATE_FORMAT(G.REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') AS REGDATE, DATE_FORMAT(SP.START_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS START_DTM, T.TARGET_ID, ST.RECON_SCHEDULE_ID FROM pi_schedule_group G LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_datatypes_user DU ON G.STD_ID = DU.STD_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_scan_policy SP ON G.POLICY_ID = SP.IDX LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_schedule_targets ST ON G.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID = ST.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID AND DU.AP_NO = ST.AP_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_targets T ON ST.TARGET_ID = T.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = ST.AP_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_target_user TU ON TU.target_id = ST.target_id AND TU.AP_NO = ST.AP_NO
AND TU.userFlag = 'server1'
WHERE 1 = 1
AND TU.USER_NO = '${user_no}'
AND G.TYPE = ${sch_type}
AND G.SCHEDULE_GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', '${title}', '%')
AND T.TARGET_ID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY G.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID) D WHERE 1 = 1
AND D.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', '${writer}', '%')
AND D.REGDATE BETWEEN CONCAT(#{fromDate},' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{toDate},' 23:59:59')
ORDER BY D.REGDATE DESC, D.SCHEDULE_GROUP_NAME
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pi_schedule_group ( SCHEDULE_GROUP_NAME, USER_NO, STATUS, TYPE, POLICY_ID, DATATYPE_ID, STD_ID, REGDATE ) VALUES ( #{scheduleName}, #{user_no}, '1', #{type}, #{policy_id}, #{datatype_id}, #{std_id}, NOW() )
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID

INSERT INTO pi_schedule_group ( SCHEDULE_GROUP_NAME, USER_NO, STATUS, TYPE, POLICY_ID, DATATYPE_ID, STD_ID, REGDATE ) VALUES ( #{scheduleName}, #{user_no}, '1', '2', #{policy_id}, #{datatype_id}, #{std_id}, NOW() )
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID

INSERT INTO pi_schedule_targets ( TARGET_ID, LOCATION_ID, AP_NO, SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID, RECON_SCHEDULE_ID, STATUS, POLICY_ID, DATATYPE_ID, CONFIRM, ACTION, REGDATE ) VALUES ( #{target_id}, #{location_id}, #{ap_no}, #{groupID}, #{reconScheduleID}, "1", #{policy_id}, #{datatype_id}, 0, #{action}, NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT T.TARGET_ID, '8987302884414283716' AS LOCATION_ID, T.AP_NO, T.NAME, DU.DATATYPE_ID, SP.STD_ID, NS.POLICY_ID, SP.ACTION, NS.TRACE, IFNULL(NS.DRM_STATUS, 'NONE') AS DRM_STATUS FROM pi_targets T, skt_net_schedule NS, pi_scan_policy SP, pi_datatypes_user DU, pi_locations L WHERE NS.POLICY_ID = SP.IDX
AND L.NET_ID = NS.NET_ID AND NS.LOCATION_ID = L.LOCATION_ID
AND T.NET_ID = NS.NET_ID
AND SP.STD_ID = DU.STD_ID AND T.AP_NO = DU.AP_NO AND T.TARGET_ID = L.TARGET_ID AND NS.ENABLE = 'Y' AND T.TARGET_ID = #{target_id} AND L.LOCATION_ID = #{location_id} AND T.AP_NO = #{ap_no}

SELECT T.TARGET_ID, T.AP_NO, T.NAME, A.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, L.LOCATION_ID FROM pi_targets T LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_agents A ON T.NAME = A.AGENT_NAME LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_LOCATIONS L ON T.TARGET_ID = L.TARGET_ID AND (L.DESCRIPTION REGEXP 'Catalog|All local files') WHERE T.AP_NO != 0 AND A.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP REGEXP #{net_ip}
SELECT MAX(NET_ID)+1 AS NET_ID FROM skt_net_schedule
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SKT_NET_SCHEDULE (NET_ID, NET_TYPE, AP_NO, NET_TYPE_ID, NET_TYPE_NM, POLICY_ID, REGDATE, TRACE, DRM_STATUS, SCANDAY) VALUES (#{net_id}, #{type}, #{ap_no}, #{rangeId}, #{rangeNm}, #{policyId}, NOW(), #{trace}, #{drm}, #{scanday})

INSERT INTO SKT_NET_SCHEDULE (NET_ID, NET_TYPE, AP_NO, NET_TYPE_ID, LOCATION_ID, NET_TYPE_NM, POLICY_ID, REGDATE, TRACE, DRM_STATUS, SCANDAY) VALUES (#{net_id}, #{type}, #{ap_no}, #{targetId}, #{rangeId}, #{rangeOneDriveNm}, #{policyId}, NOW(), #{trace}, #{drm}, NULL)
mapper.update: UPDATE SKT_NET_SCHEDULE SET NET_TYPE = #{type}, AP_NO = #{ap_no}, location_id = null, NET_TYPE_ID = #{rangeId}, NET_TYPE_NM = #{rangeNm}, POLICY_ID = #{policyId}, REGDATE = NOW(), TRACE = #{trace}, SCANDAY = #{scanday}, DRM_STATUS = #{drm} WHERE NET_ID = #{net_id}

UPDATE SKT_NET_SCHEDULE SET NET_TYPE = #{type}, AP_NO = #{rangeId}, location_id = #{rangeId}, NET_TYPE_ID = #{rangeId}, NET_TYPE_NM = #{rangeOneDriveNm}, POLICY_ID = #{policyId}, REGDATE = NOW(), TRACE = #{trace}, DAY = #{day}, DRM_STATUS = NULL WHERE NET_ID = #{net_id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO SKT_NET_SCHEDULE_TIME (NET_ID, SCHEDULE_TIME, NET_TYPE_NM) VALUES
(#{net_id}, #{item}, #{rangeNm})

INSERT INTO SKT_NET_SCHEDULE_TIME (NET_ID, SCHEDULE_TIME, NET_TYPE_NM) VALUES
(#{net_id}, #{item}, #{rangeNm})
mapper.update: UPDATE pi_targets T, (SELECT * FROM (WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS (SELECT 0 AS LEVEL, G.INSA_CODE, G.TEAM_NAME, G.TEAM_NAME AS FULL_TEAM_NM, G.UP_IDX FROM pi_group G WHERE 1 = 1 AND G.INSA_CODE = #{rangeId} UNION ALL SELECT CTE.LEVEL + 1 AS LEVEL, PG.INSA_CODE, PG.TEAM_NAME, CONCAT(CTE.FULL_TEAM_NM, '>', PG.TEAM_NAME) AS FULL_TEAM_NM, PG.UP_IDX FROM pi_group PG, CTE WHERE PG.UP_IDX = CTE.INSA_CODE ) SELECT TU.TARGET_ID, TU.AP_NO FROM CTE, pi_user U, pi_target_user TU WHERE CTE.INSA_CODE = U.INSA_CODE AND TU.USER_NO = U.USER_NO AND TU.AP_NO != 0) AS D) D SET T.NET_ID = #{net_id} WHERE 1 = 1 AND T.TARGET_ID = D.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = D.AP_NO AND T.TARGET_USE = 'Y'
UPDATE SKT_NET_SCHEDULE SET ENABLE = 'N' WHERE NET_ID = #{before_net_id} AND LOCATION_ID IS NOT NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT (CASE WHEN (D.TYPE = 3 AND D.PC_COUNT > 1 ) THEN CONCAT(NET_TYPE_NAME ,'외 ', PC_COUNT-1, '건' )ELSE NET_TYPE_NAME END ) AS NET_TYPE_NM , D.* FROM (SELECT NS.NET_ID, NS.NET_TYPE AS TYPE, NS.AP_NO, SP.DATATYPE_ID, (CASE WHEN NS.NET_TYPE = 0 THEN '네트워크' WHEN NS.NET_TYPE = 1 THEN '그룹' WHEN NS.NET_TYPE = 2 THEN 'PC' ELSE 'OneDrive' END) AS TYPE_NM, NS.NET_TYPE_ID, L.LOCATION_ID, NS.NET_TYPE_NM AS NET_TYPE_NAME, T.PLATFORM, A.AGENT_CONNECTED, NS.POLICY_ID, SP.POLICY_NAME, NS.TRACE, NS.DRM_STATUS, NS.SCANDAY, (CASE WHEN NS.NET_TYPE != 3 THEN (SELECT COUNT(T.NAME) FROM pi_targets T WHERE NS.NET_ID =T.NET_ID AND T.AP_NO != 0) ELSE (SELECT COUNT(L.PATH) FROM pi_locations L WHERE NS.NET_ID =L.NET_ID ) END) AS PC_COUNT, DATE_FORMAT(NS.REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS REGDATE FROM skt_net_schedule NS LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_targets T ON NS.NET_TYPE_ID = T.TARGET_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_locations L ON T.TARGET_ID = L.TARGET_ID AND NS.LOCATION_ID = L.LOCATION_ID AND NS.NET_ID = L.NET_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_agents A ON T.NAME = A.AGENT_NAME AND T.AP_NO = A.AP_NO , pi_scan_policy SP WHERE NS.POLICY_ID = SP.IDX AND NS.ENABLE = 'Y'
AND SP.POLICY_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{net_nm},'%')
GROUP BY NS.NET_ID ORDER BY NS.REGDATE DESC) D

SELECT NS.NET_ID, NS.NET_TYPE AS TYPE, ST.SCHEDULE_TIME, (CASE WHEN NS.NET_TYPE = 0 THEN '네트워크' WHEN NS.NET_TYPE = 1 THEN '그룹' ELSE 'PC' END) AS TYPE_NM FROM skt_net_schedule NS, skt_net_schedule_time ST WHERE 1=1 AND NS.NET_ID = ST.NET_ID
AND NS.NET_ID = #{net_id}

WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS (SELECT 0 AS LEVEL, G.INSA_CODE, G.TEAM_NAME, G.TEAM_NAME AS FULL_TEAM_NM, G.UP_IDX FROM pi_group G WHERE 1 = 1 AND G.INSA_CODE = #{group_id} UNION ALL SELECT CTE.LEVEL + 1 AS LEVEL, PG.INSA_CODE, PG.TEAM_NAME, CONCAT(CTE.FULL_TEAM_NM, '>', PG.TEAM_NAME) AS FULL_TEAM_NM, PG.UP_IDX FROM pi_group PG, CTE WHERE PG.INSA_CODE = CTE.UP_IDX ) SELECT SNS.NET_ID FROM CTE, skt_net_schedule SNS WHERE CTE.INSA_CODE = SNS.NET_TYPE_ID AND SNS.NET_TYPE = 1 AND SNS.ENABLE = 'Y' AND CTE.INSA_CODE != #{group_id} ORDER BY CTE.LEVEL LIMIT 1

WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS (SELECT 0 AS LEVEL, G.INSA_CODE, G.TEAM_NAME, G.TEAM_NAME AS FULL_TEAM_NM, G.UP_IDX FROM pi_group G WHERE 1 = 1 AND G.INSA_CODE = (SELECT U.INSA_CODE FROM PI_TARGET_USER TU, PI_USER U WHERE TU.TARGET_ID = #{group_id} AND TU.AP_NO = #{ap_no} AND TU.USER_NO = U.USER_NO) UNION ALL SELECT CTE.LEVEL + 1 AS LEVEL, PG.INSA_CODE, PG.TEAM_NAME, CONCAT(CTE.FULL_TEAM_NM, '>', PG.TEAM_NAME) AS FULL_TEAM_NM, PG.UP_IDX FROM pi_group PG, CTE WHERE PG.INSA_CODE = CTE.UP_IDX ) SELECT SNS.NET_ID FROM CTE, skt_net_schedule SNS WHERE CTE.INSA_CODE = SNS.NET_TYPE_ID AND SNS.NET_TYPE = 1 AND SNS.ENABLE = 'Y' ORDER BY CTE.LEVEL LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE PI_TARGETS T, SKT_NET_SCHEDULE SNS SET T.NET_ID = SNS.NET_ID WHERE T.NET_ID = #{NET_ID} AND CONCAT('TYPE',T.NET_TYPE) = SNS.NET_TYPE_ID AND SNS.NET_TYPE = 0 AND SNS.ENABLE = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT LPAD(COUNT(*)+1, '2', '0') AS COUNT FROM pi_schedule_group G WHERE DATE_FORMAT(G.REGDATE, '%Y%m%d') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') AND G.USER_NO = #{user_no}

SELECT SNI.TYPE, SNI.TYPE_NAME, IFNULL(SNI.TYPE_CLASS, '-') AS TYPE_CLASS, SNI.IP, SNI.MASK, SNI.MASK_IP, DATE_FORMAT(SNI.REGDATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REGDATE FROM SKT_NET_IP SNI WHERE 1=1
AND SNI.TYPE = #{net_type}
AND SNI.IP LIKE CONCAT('%', #{net_ip}, '%')
AND SNI.TYPE_CLASS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{net_type_class}, '%')
AND SNI.REGDATE BETWEEN CONCAT(#{fromDate},' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{toDate},' 23:59:59')
ORDER BY TYPE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SKT_NET_IP (TYPE, TYPE_NAME, TYPE_CLASS, IP, MASK, MASK_IP, REGDATE) VALUES (#{type}, #{type_name}, #{type_class}, #{ip}, #{mask}, #{mask_ip}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE pi_targets T, (SELECT * FROM (WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS (SELECT 0 AS LEVEL, G.INSA_CODE, G.TEAM_NAME, G.TEAM_NAME AS FULL_TEAM_NM, G.UP_IDX FROM pi_group G WHERE 1 = 1 AND G.INSA_CODE = #{beforeRangeId} UNION ALL SELECT CTE.LEVEL + 1 AS LEVEL, PG.INSA_CODE, PG.TEAM_NAME, CONCAT(CTE.FULL_TEAM_NM, '>', PG.TEAM_NAME) AS FULL_TEAM_NM, PG.UP_IDX FROM pi_group PG, CTE WHERE PG.UP_IDX = CTE.INSA_CODE ) SELECT TU.TARGET_ID, TU.AP_NO FROM CTE, pi_user U, pi_target_user TU WHERE CTE.INSA_CODE = U.INSA_CODE AND TU.USER_NO = U.USER_NO AND TU.AP_NO != 0) AS D) D SET T.NET_ID = NULL WHERE 1 = 1 AND T.TARGET_ID = D.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = D.AP_NO
UPDATE PI_LOCATIONS SET NET_ID = NULL WHERE 1=1 AND NET_ID = #{net_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SKT_NET_IP (TYPE, TYPE_NAME, TYPE_CLASS, IP, MASK, MASK_IP, REGDATE) VALUES ( #{type}, #{type_name}, #{type_class}, #{ip}, #{mask}, #{mask_ip}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE IP = #{ip}

INSERT INTO pi_schedule_management ( recon_id, schedule_id, active_status, start_time, pause_time, week_day, user_no, regdate, ap_no ) VALUES ( #{schedule_id}, #{schedule_group_id}, #{active_status}, #{start_time}, #{pause_time}, #{week_day}, #{user_no}, now(), #{ap_no} )
mapper.select: SELECT IDX, SCHEDULE_ID, ACTIVE_STATUS, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT WEEK_DAY) AS WEEK_DAY, START_TIME, PAUSE_TIME FROM PI_SCHEDULE_MANAGEMENT SM WHERE SM.SCHEDULE_ID = #{sch_id} AND SM.ACTIVE_STATUS != '01' GROUP BY START_TIME, PAUSE_TIME ORDER BY ACTIVE_STATUS DESC

SELECT IDX, SCHEDULE_ID, ACTIVE_STATUS, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT WEEK_DAY) AS WEEK_DAY, START_TIME, PAUSE_TIME, USER_NO FROM PI_SCHEDULE_MANAGEMENT SM WHERE SM.SCHEDULE_ID = #{sch_id} AND SM.ACTIVE_STATUS = '00' GROUP BY START_TIME, PAUSE_TIME ORDER BY ACTIVE_STATUS DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE pi_schedule_management SET active_status = '01', user_no = #{user_no}, regdate = now() WHERE active_status != '02' AND schedule_id = #{sch_id}
mapper.select: SELECT A.AGENT_ID AS ID, A.AGENT_NAME AS NAME FROM pi_agents A WHERE 1=1 AND A.AGENT_USE = 'Y' AND A.AGENT_CONNECTED = 1 AND A.AGENT_PROXY = 1 AND A.AP_NO = 0
SELECT GROUP_ID FROM PI_GROUPALL WHERE NAME = 'DEFAULT GROUP' AND AP_NO = 0 GROUP BY GROUP_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PI_TARGETS (GROUP_ID, TARGET_ID, AP_NO, NAME, TARGET_USE, SEARCH_TIME, SEARCH_STATUS, PLATFORM, REGDATE, ERROR, NOTICE, MATCHCNT) VALUES (#{group_id}, #{target_id}, 0, #{name}, 'Y', 0, 'none', #{platform}, NOW(), 0, 0, 0)

INSERT INTO PI_LOCATIONS (GROUP_ID, TARGET_ID, LOCATION_ID, AP_NO, PROXY_ID, CREDENTIAL_ID, PATH, PROTOCOL, DESCRIPTION, REGDATE) VALUES (#{group_id}, #{target_id}, #{location_id}, 0, #{proxy_id}, #{credential_id}, #{path} , #{protocol}, #{description}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT L.PROTOCOL, L.CREDENTIAL_ID, L.PROXY_ID FROM pi_locations L WHERE L.TARGET_ID = #{target_id} GROUP BY L.TARGET_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pi_scan_policy_server (policy_id, in_idx, target_id, ap_no, regdate) VALUES (#{policy_id}, #{in_idx}, #{target_id}, #{ap_no}, now()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE POLICY_ID = #{policy_id}, regdate = NOW()
DELETE FROM PI_SCAN_POLICY_SERVER WHERE POLICY_ID = #{policy_id}
mapper.select: SELECT AP.AP_NO, AP.SET_TYPE, AP.IP FROM PI_AP_SERVER AP
